overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from street level up to an elevated glass walkway overlooking a plaza with the 'Brooklyn Bar' neon sign visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with neon billboards and futuristic architecture

events.description: character turns and crosses the wet street
approaching entrance to elevated walkway building

agents.ego_description: walking along the rainy sidewalk, crossing the street, and approaching the elevated walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: walking with an orange umbrella across the street

entered.detail: rain-soaked street with reflective puddles and blue neon lane markings
large red digital billboard with white graphic design
tall black lamp posts with yellow bases illuminating the rain
tall buildings with illuminated windows and glass facades
building with large illuminated signage reading SEE YOUR CITY YOU CAN TRUST

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a heavy downpour on a wet city street, passing neon billboards and street lamps. The rain creates reflective puddles on the asphalt as the character crosses the road and approaches a building entrance with prominent signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with transparent glass flooring

events.description: enters covered elevated walkway from street level, transitioning to glass floor
character pauses briefly to look down through the transparent glass floor

agents.ego_description: walking on the elevated glass walkway and looking down at the street level below through transparent flooring

entered.detail: transparent glass flooring showing the lower street level beneath
illuminated orange sign for pizza shop visible through the glass floor
green neon cross symbols indicating medical facility
black metal safety railings along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters an elevated walkway with a transparent glass floor revealing the street below. Green neon medical clinic signs line the walls while the Buck-a-Slice restaurant sign is visible through the glass flooring. The space is semi-covered, sheltering from the rain while maintaining an open feel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlooking lower commercial district with Brooklyn Bar

events.description: reaches plaza overlook with prominent view of Brooklyn Bar neon sign
stops at railing to look down at pedestrians in the lower plaza

agents.ego_description: standing at the railing overlooking the lower plaza and observing the Brooklyn Bar and pedestrians below

notable_agents.action: walking through the lower plaza visible from the overlook

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading BROOKLYN BAR on the lower level
lower level shopping area with pedestrians and storefronts
tall vertical digital advertisement screens with colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the elevated plaza to an overlook featuring the prominent pink Brooklyn Bar neon sign. From this vantage point, the lower plaza with its shops and pedestrians is visible below. Vertical neon billboards illuminate the multi-level cyberpunk architecture while rain continues to fall in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city street up into an elevated, neon-lit architectural complex. It begins with the character navigating a heavy downpour on a wet asphalt road, passing reflective puddles and glowing billboards. As the character enters a building, the scene shifts to a semi-covered elevated walkway where the rain recedes and a transparent glass floor reveals the Buck-a-Slice restaurant and street level below. The camera then glides past green medical clinic signs along the walls before opening up to a wide plaza overlook. Finally, the view expands to reveal the prominent pink Brooklyn Bar neon sign and a sprawling multi-level cityscape of vertical billboards and pedestrians beneath the falling rain.
